name: 化学计量学（mol/方程式/产率）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应性 2 · 化学变化 Reactivity 2 · How Much, How Fast, How Far
curriculum_points: Apply the mole concept to substances, using the relationships n = m/M, n = V (gas)/V_m, and n = cV to determine amounts of reactants and products in chemical reactions (AO2).
Determine the limiting reactant and the theoretical yield of a reaction from given data, and calculate percentage yield and atom economy (AO2, AO3).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「化学计量学（mol/方程式/产率）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Apply the mole concept to substances, using the relationships n = m/M, n = V (gas)/V_m, and n = cV to determine amounts …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Determine the limiting reactant and the theoretical yield of a reaction from giv… 对理解「化学计量学（mol/方程式/产率）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
